name: Koyou Rentia Co., Ltd.
summary: Koyou Rentia Co., Ltd. engages in the general furniture and equipment rental business. The company is involved in renting out furniture and equipment to companies in construction, real estate brokerage, event organization, IT, and other industries in Japan and internationally. It also provides office relocation, cleaning and repair, and office designing services, as well as operates 4 recycle shops. The company was founded in 1970 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
